description: S44Q - Create app_constants.dart with all pricing, token caps, device limits, trial, file limits, UI, and cost protection constants. Then replace all hardcoded values across the frontend with AppConstants references. Add performance optimizations: RepaintBoundary on chat bubbles and sidebar items, ListView.builder with cacheExtent/addAutomaticKeepAlives, const widgets where possible, verify dispose() calls.
steps: Create frontend/lib/core/constants/app_constants.dart with the following constant groups: (1) PRICING: basicMonthly=4.99, basicAnnual=49.99, proMonthly=9.99, proAnnual=99.99, annualSavingsPercent=17, (2) TOKEN CAPS: freeTokenCap5Hour=40000, basicTokenCapDaily=100000, proTokenCapWeekly=500000, proTokenCapMonthly=2000000, (3) DEVICE LIMITS: freeDevices=1, basicDevices=3, proDevices=10, (4) TRIAL: trialDurationDays=14, (5) FILE LIMITS: maxFileSizeBytes=10*1024*1024, (6) UI: usageRefreshIntervalSeconds=60, (7) COST PROTECTION: defaultDailyLimit=100000. Include display name helpers for token caps (40K, 100K, 500K, 2M).
Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/settings/subscription_screen.dart: Replace hardcoded prices '$4.99', '$49.99', '$9.99', '$99.99' with AppConstants references. Import app_constants.dart.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/auth/onboarding_screen.dart: Replace '14 days free' heading, plan prices '$4.99/mo', '$49.99/yr', '$9.99/mo', '$99.99/yr', 'Save 17%' with AppConstants references.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/settings/usage_screen.dart: Replace hardcoded defaults 40000, 100000, 500000, 2000000 with AppConstants references. Replace Timer duration 60 seconds with AppConstants.usageRefreshIntervalSeconds.
Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/common/trial_banner_widget.dart: Replace _trialDurationDays = 14 with AppConstants.trialDurationDays. Replace '$9.99/month after trial' string.
Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/token_cap_banner.dart: Replace display names '40K', '100K', '500K', '2M' with AppConstants display name helpers.

Update frontend/lib/data/providers/usage_provider.dart: Replace dailyLimit default 100000 with AppConstants.defaultDailyLimit. Replace Timer Duration(seconds: 60) with AppConstants.usageRefreshIntervalSeconds.
Performance: In chat_screen.dart _buildMessagesList, wrap each chat bubble in RepaintBoundary. Add cacheExtent: 500 and addAutomaticKeepAlives: false to the ListView.builder.
Performance: In sidebar_widget.dart _buildChatList, add cacheExtent: 500 and addAutomaticKeepAlives: false to the ListView.builder. Wrap each ChatItem in RepaintBoundary.
Performance: Verify all AnimationControllers and Timers have proper dispose() calls (they currently do in chat_screen.dart, sidebar_widget.dart, usage_screen.dart, and usage_provider.dart).
acceptance_criteria: frontend/lib/core/constants/app_constants.dart exists with all constants organized in logical groups
No hardcoded pricing values (4.99, 49.99, 9.99, 99.99) remain in subscription_screen.dart or onboarding_screen.dart
No hardcoded token caps (40000, 100000, 500000, 2000000) remain in usage_screen.dart or usage_provider.dart
No hardcoded file size (10 * 1024 * 1024) remains in plus_panel_widget.dart or file_upload_widget.dart
Trial duration uses AppConstants.trialDurationDays instead of literal 14
RepaintBoundary wraps chat bubbles in chat_screen.dart and sidebar items
ListView.builder has cacheExtent: 500 and addAutomaticKeepAlives: false in chat_screen and sidebar
Code compiles without errors (flutter analyze passes)
verification: Run: cd frontend && flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos 2>&1 | tail -20

Check no hardcoded values remain: grep -rn '10 \* 1024 \* 1024\|4\.99\|49\.99\|9\.99\|99\.99\|40000\|100000\|500000\|2000000' frontend/lib/ --include='*.dart' | grep -v app_constants.dart | grep -v '.agents'
findings: All steps completed successfully. Constants file created with all groups. All hardcoded values replaced across 9 files. Performance optimizations (RepaintBoundary, cacheExtent, addAutomaticKeepAlives) applied to chat_screen.dart and sidebar_widget.dart. Network is INTEGRATIONS_ONLY so flutter analyze could not be run, but all changes are syntactically correct based on manual review. The UsageState const constructor with AppConstants.defaultDailyTokenLimit works because it is a static const int (compile-time constant).
